title: Sumerian/Akkadian: Praise of the Pickaxe
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Praise of the Pickaxe.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Praise of the Pickaxe.

translation.text: From 'Praise of the Pickaxe': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
